issues.claim: Verse supports chapter 7 thesis at appropriate thread
issues.objection: 7.30 sits in thread 3 (knowing-at-departure-of-mind; STRETCHED; chapter closes) of the chapter-7 thesis; the engineering layer remains anchored to that thread. Chapter 7's voice (declarative-revelatory; senior-revealing) is honored. STRETCHED tagging is honest where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog (per thesis: 7.21-7.26 and 7.29-7.30 expected to run STRETCHED; 7.27-7.28 STRONG). The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Chapter-closing verse. Heavy metaphysics: adhibhūta/adhidaiva/adhiyajña + prayāṇa-kāla. Forward-pointer to Ch 8 honored explicitly. Engineering analog scoped at career-end-departure substrate-articulation. Counter-example: performative all-hands talk that does not survive the team's actual problems is the failure mode.

notes: 7.30 supports the chapter-7 thesis: thread 3 (knowing-at-departure-of-mind; STRETCHED; chapter closes). Verse-ordering coherence: progressive build-up from faith-firm doctrine (7.21-7.22) → bounded-fruit (7.23) → metaphysical concealment (7.24-7.26) → dualities-and-meritorious-cross (7.27-7.28) → knowing-at-departure (7.29-7.30) honored. PASS.
